name: AI Coding Assistant Security Review
description: Security assessment of AI coding assistant with GitHub OAuth integration, Slack connectivity, natural language to SQL query generation on Postgres, and browser extension functionality
prompt: Analyze the security architecture of an AI coding assistant that integrates with GitHub (OAuth), Slack for notifications, converts natural language to SQL queries on a Postgres database, and includes a browser extension. Identify all DSGAI risks, provide attack scenarios, and recommend tiered mitigations with CVE references.
expected_outcome: Should identify DSGAI02, DSGAI06, DSGAI12, DSGAI16, DSGAI03 with detailed attack scenarios, tiered mitigations, and relevant CVE references
